languages.text: Чума лишь ускорила то, что ждало корабль под руководством чемпиона Темных Богов. Шепот, льющийся из каждой щели флагмана, превратил обычных рабочих в сплав металла и скверны, неукоснительно подчиняющийся своему единственному господину.

The plague only accelerated what awaited the ship under the leadership of the champion of the Dark Gods. The whispers that poured forth from every crevice of the flagship turned ordinary workers into alloys of metal and corruption, unswervingly loyal to their only master.
languages.original_text: Чума лишь ускорила то, что ждало корабль под руководством чемпиона Темных Богов. Шепот, льющийся из каждой щели флагмана, превратил обычных рабочих в сплав металла и скверны, неукоснительно подчиняющийся своему единственному господину.

traits.locale_text: The plague only accelerated what awaited the ship under the leadership of the champion of the Dark Gods. The whispers that poured forth from every crevice of the flagship turned ordinary workers into alloys of metal and corruption, unswervingly loyal to their only master.

The plague only accelerated what awaited the ship under the leadership of the champion of the Dark Gods. The whispers that poured forth from every crevice of the flagship turned ordinary workers into alloys of metal and corruption, unswervingly loyal to their only master.

languages.text: 疫病は、闇の支配者である船長の率いる船が待ち受ける運命を早めたに過ぎない。旗艦のあらゆる隙間から溢れ出すささやきが、普通の人々を金属と腐敗の合金に変え、唯一の主人に絶対的な忠誠を誓わせた。
languages.original_text: The plague only accelerated what awaited the ship under the leadership of the champion of the Dark Gods. The whispers that poured forth from every crevice of the flagship turned ordinary workers into alloys of metal and corruption, unswervingly loyal to their only master.

traits.locale_text: 疫病は、闇の支配者である船長の率いる船が待ち受ける運命を早めたに過ぎない。旗艦のあらゆる隙間から溢れ出すささやきが、普通の人々を金属と腐敗の合金に変え、唯一の主人に絶対的な忠誠を誓わせた。

languages.text: 在黑暗诸神神选者的统治下，这艘旗舰的命运早已注定，而这场瘟疫不过是按下了快进键。旗舰的每一道缝隙中都倾泻出低语，将普通劳工转化成金属与腐化的混合体，令他们对唯一的主人绝对忠诚。
languages.original_text: The plague only accelerated what awaited the ship under the leadership of the champion of the Dark Gods. The whispers that poured forth from every crevice of the flagship turned ordinary workers into alloys of metal and corruption, unswervingly loyal to their only master.

traits.locale_text: 在黑暗诸神神选者的统治下，这艘旗舰的命运早已注定，而这场瘟疫不过是按下了快进键。旗舰的每一道缝隙中都倾泻出低语，将普通劳工转化成金属与腐化的混合体，令他们对唯一的主人绝对忠诚。

languages.text: La maladie ne fit que précipiter le sort qui attendait l'équipage sous le commandement {mf|du champion|de la championne} des Dieux Sombres. Les murmures jaillissant de toutes les fissures du vaisseau amiral transformaient les ouvriers ordinaires en alliages de métal et de corruption qui vouaient une loyauté indéfectible à leur unique {mf|maître|maîtresse}.
languages.original_text: The plague only accelerated what awaited the ship under the leadership of the champion of the Dark Gods. The whispers that poured forth from every crevice of the flagship turned ordinary workers into alloys of metal and corruption, unswervingly loyal to their only master.

traits.locale_text: La maladie ne fit que précipiter le sort qui attendait l'équipage sous le commandement {mf|du champion|de la championne} des Dieux Sombres. Les murmures jaillissant de toutes les fissures du vaisseau amiral transformaient les ouvriers ordinaires en alliages de métal et de corruption qui vouaient une loyauté indéfectible à leur unique {mf|maître|maîtresse}.

languages.text: La plaga solo aceleró lo que esperaba a la nave bajo el liderazgo de{mf|l| la} {mf|campeón|campeona} de los Dioses Oscuros. Los susurros que rezumaban por cada resquicio de la nave insignia convirtieron a los trabajadores corrientes en aleaciones de metal y corrupción con una lealtad inquebrantable a su am{mf|o|a}.
languages.original_text: The plague only accelerated what awaited the ship under the leadership of the champion of the Dark Gods. The whispers that poured forth from every crevice of the flagship turned ordinary workers into alloys of metal and corruption, unswervingly loyal to their only master.

traits.locale_text: La plaga solo aceleró lo que esperaba a la nave bajo el liderazgo de{mf|l| la} {mf|campeón|campeona} de los Dioses Oscuros. Los susurros que rezumaban por cada resquicio de la nave insignia convirtieron a los trabajadores corrientes en aleaciones de metal y corrupción con una lealtad inquebrantable a su am{mf|o|a}.

languages.text: Veba, Kara Tanrılar'ın müdafisinin liderliği altında gemiyi bekleyenleri hızlandırdı. Sancak gemisinin her çatlağından dökülen fısıltılar; sıradan işçileri, tek efendilerine sarsılmaz bir sadakatle bağlı metal ve yozlaşma alaşımlarına dönüştürdü.
languages.original_text: The plague only accelerated what awaited the ship under the leadership of the champion of the Dark Gods. The whispers that poured forth from every crevice of the flagship turned ordinary workers into alloys of metal and corruption, unswervingly loyal to their only master.

traits.locale_text: Veba, Kara Tanrılar'ın müdafisinin liderliği altında gemiyi bekleyenleri hızlandırdı. Sancak gemisinin her çatlağından dökülen fısıltılar; sıradan işçileri, tek efendilerine sarsılmaz bir sadakatle bağlı metal ve yozlaşma alaşımlarına dönüştürdü.

languages.text: Dabei beschleunigte die Seuche nur das, was das Schiff unter der Führung des Champions der Dunklen Götter ohnehin erwartete. Das Flüstern, das aus jeder Ritze des Flaggschiffs drang, verwandelte einfache Arbeiter in Legierungen aus Metall und Verderbnis mit einer unerschütterlichen Loyalität für ihren einzigen Meister.
languages.original_text: The plague only accelerated what awaited the ship under the leadership of the champion of the Dark Gods. The whispers that poured forth from every crevice of the flagship turned ordinary workers into alloys of metal and corruption, unswervingly loyal to their only master.

Das Flüstern, das aus jeder Ritze des Flaggschiffs drang, verwandelte einfache Arbeiter in Legierungen aus Metall und Verderbnis mit einer unerschütterlichen Loyalität für ihren einzigen Meister.
